completed_steps.summary: Classified multi-part: backend (Play 1.x Java) + frontend (Nuxt 3 SPA)
Found README, CLAUDE, openspec specs + changes; no other docs/
Tech stack: Play 1.11.x/Java 25/JPA+H2 backend, Nuxt 3/pnpm/Vitest/Playwright frontend
Deep-scanned controllers, models, services, agents, llm, tools, jobs, channels, test, conf
Deep-scanned pages, components, composables, middleware, types, utils, test

backend.api_endpoints: ~70 routes across 14 Api* controllers + 3 Webhook* controllers
backend.jpa_entities: 13 entities (Agent, AgentBinding, Conversation, Message, Task, Memory, Config, EventLog, ChannelConfig, AgentToolConfig, AgentSkillConfig, AgentSkillAllowedTool, SkillRegistryTool) + 2 string-backed enums
backend.background_jobs: 7 Play jobs, TaskPoller uses virtual-thread executor
backend.llm_providers: sealed LlmProvider hierarchy: OpenAI, OpenRouter, Ollama
backend.tools: 11 built-in tools; shell-exec allowlist is DB-authoritative (AgentSkillAllowedTool)

frontend.pages: 11 pages (largest: settings 1575 LOC, chat 1036, agents 1007, skills 859)
frontend.composables: 7 (useAuth, useApiMutation, useEventBus, useConfirm, useTheme, useProviders, useToolMeta)
frontend.state_mgmt: useState + composables (no Pinia despite README claim)

deploy.ci: Jenkins (JDK25 + node-22); parallel BE/FE build+test; packages into single jclaw.zip
deploy.compose: docker-compose.yml with volumes: data, logs, workspace, skills
